The 200-day daily moving average (DMA) is used by traders as a key indicator for determining the overall trend in a particular stock. As long as the stock is priced above the 200-day SMA on the daily timeframe, it is generally considered to be in an overall uptrend. Take a look:

articles.title: Bid to clean up a rotten trail in Hyderabad’s thriving food scene
articles.description: Beneath Hyderabad’s booming food economy lies a dark web of adulteration, mislabelling and unsafe practices. Of late, an unprecedented police-led crackdown is pulling back the curtain on a sprawling food fraud network that thrives on gaps in regulation and consumer trust. But as enforcement tightens and complaints surge, the city finds itself trying not just to fix a broken food chain, but also to restore faith in what lands on every plate, write Serish Nanisetti and Lavpreet Kaur

articles.title: Fire in fruit and vegetable market in Lucknow, around 15 shops gutted
articles.description: Deputy Commissioner of Police (South) Amit Kumar Anand said no casualties were reported

articles.title: From mass conferences to digital platforms: the DMK’s 77-year journey
articles.description: Largely dependent on the charisma and eloquence of its founder, C.N. Annadurai, the DMK also had an array of articulate leaders, backed by an enviable organisational structure

articles.title: Rahul Gandhi promises to end ‘discriminatory system’ in CAPF leadership
articles.description: Rahul Gandhi says Central Armed Police Forces personnel should lead their own forces; vows reforms on promotions, pay and leadership roles

articles.title: Energy prices may take ‘months’ to normalise, despite ceasefire: Analysts
articles.description: There needs to be a predictable and stable flow of cargo through the strait before markets can stabilise, experts say.

articles.title: TCS deal wins signal stability despite AI concerns: Sandip Agarwal
articles.description: TCS's robust $12 billion Total Contract Value signals stability amidst AI disruption fears, indicating intact client spending. Analysts project 5-6% dollar growth and 16-17% rupee earnings CAGR, suggesting potential stock rerating. IT firms' system integrator role remains a strong moat, though AI may alter cost-sharing dynamics.

articles.title: President Murmu nominates Harivansh to Rajya Sabha
articles.description: He has been nominated as a member of the Rajya Sabha after the vacancy was created following the retirement of former Chief Justice of India Ranjan Gogoi

articles.title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Brisk polling in Kottayam, Pathanamthitta districts
articles.description: Kottayam records a polling percentage of 74.60%, up from 72.13% in 2021. In Pathanamthitta, the overall polling percentage stands at 70.76%, up from 69.64% in 2021

topStories.title: Apple Moves to Access Samsung Records in App Store Antitrust Case
topStories.description: Apple has reportedly approached a US court to secure internal documents from Samsung Electronics in South Korea. The move is said to be linked to the ongoing antitrust lawsuit brought by the US...

topStories.title: Watch: Sabarimala women entry case: What happened in the Supreme Court?
topStories.description: The Sabarimala case is back in the Supreme Court, and this time, the debate has taken a sharp turn. During Wednesday’s hearing, the Centre told the court that some of its most progressive judgments may actually be “not good law.” And at the heart of this argument lies one question: how much power should courts really have over religion? What were the three arguments posed by Solicitor General Tushar Mehta? What is the Sabarimala women entry case all about?

topStories.title: Pakistan Declares 2-day holiday In Islamabad ahead of US-Iran Talks
topStories.description: The holidays on Thursday and Friday apply only to the Islamabad Capital Territory, the notice posted by Islamabad's district commissioner on Wednesday said.

topStories.title: Xi Helps Trump On Iran War As China Assists In Ceasefire Bid
topStories.description: A pause to the fighting would smooth Trump's visit to Beijing next month, with China's role leaving the US leader in debt to his Chinese counterpart.

topStories.title: Doland Trump caught off guard as Melania shuts down Epstein link claims - what he said
topStories.description: Melania Trump denied any ties to Jeffrey Epstein, rejecting claims of victimization. In a White House statement, she emphasized her lack of relationship with Epstein, calling the accusations lies and urging Congress to hold hearings for victims.

topStories.title: FIFA Adds New Even More Expensive World Cup Ticket Categories
topStories.description: FIFA added new, even more expensive tiers of tickets for this year's World Cup, asking up to $4,105 for a front category 1 seat at the U.S. opener against Paraguay in Inglewood, California, on June...

topStories.title: Why did the Congress withdraw its candidate from Baramati at the last minute?
topStories.description: Despite Congress’ withdrawal, the election in the Pawar bastion will not be unopposed

topStories.title: Quote of the day: John F Kennedy's timeless words of wisdom — 'If free society cannot help poor, it cannot….'
topStories.description: Former US President John F Kennedy believed that a society's freedom is contingent on its support for the impoverished, linking the fates of the rich and poor.

topStories.title: Insider trading over US-Iran war? White House sends warning to staff, asks officials not to bet on prediction markets
topStories.description: The email issued on 24 March came a day after US President Donald Trump issued a brief pause on some Iran strikes. It advised employees against placing trades on financial markets and fast-growing event betting platforms.

topStories.title: UK PM Keir Starmer visits Gulf to shore up ‘fragile’ US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: As UK PM Keir Starmer arrived in Doha as part of a Gulf tour he discussed efforts to secure the US-Iran ceasefire.

topStories.title: Iran's IRGC denies attacking Gulf States as Kuwait condemns aggression, Saudi Arabia reports damage to oil facilities
topStories.description: The developments come amid a two-week ceasefire between the US and Iran, after negotiators clinched a temporary two-week truce just 90 minutes before Trump's Tuesday deadline to Tehran over the Strait of Hormuz was to expire. US and Iranian negotiators are set to meet on Saturday for talks.

topStories.title: Shipping in Strait of Hormuz still at a trickle despite US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: Washington and Tehran accuse each other of not honouring truce agreement.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court flags risk of ‘dividing society’ if temple access restricted by caste or sect
dailyNews.description: "If you say it is a practice…that only my section must attend my temple and no one else, that is not good for Hinduism,” the nine-judge bench remarked.

dailyNews.title: ‘Dishonourable!’: Trump says ‘Iran doing a very poor job’ as ship traffic slumps in Hormuz despite ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump criticized Iran for poorly managing the Strait of Hormuz and warned against reports of Tehran charging fees to oil tankers. This comment precedes US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad as the White House supports reopening the strait amidst ongoing tensions.

dailyNews.title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
dailyNews.description: The platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making bets on global events.

dailyNews.title: US Postal Service to suspend pension contributions, proposes price hikes to ease cash crisis — Here's what it said
dailyNews.description: The suspension of employer contributions to Federal Employees Retirement System annuities will help it keep making payroll, paying suppliers and delivering the mail, the USPS said.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
dailyNews.description: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

dailyNews.title: From Tucker Carlson to Candace Owens and Alex Jones, Trump takes aim at right-wing commentators—‘losers’ with ‘low IQs’
dailyNews.description: In a lengthy post on Truth Social, Trump trained his guns on former allies turned vocal critics, including Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones, dismissing them as 'losers' with low IQs attempting to hijack his movement for cheap publicity.

dailyNews.title: Trump blasts Biden admin for releasing illegal immigrant now charged in fatal hammer attack on Florida mother
dailyNews.description: President blasts Biden for releasing a Haitian immigrant now accused of fatally bludgeoning a woman with a hammer at a Florida gas station last week.

dailyNews.title: Coast Guard seizes over 4,500 pounds of cocaine worth $34M from suspected narco-terrorist vessel on Easter
dailyNews.description: DHS says the Coast Guard recovered more than 4,500 pounds of cocaine off the coast of Ecuador as part of Operation Pacific Viper counter-drug efforts.

dailyNews.title: ICE says more criminal migrants arrested on 1-year anniversary of program to support victims of migrant crime
dailyNews.description: ICE said it had arrested more illegal migrants with criminal convictions, coinciding with the one-year anniversary of the agency’s program supporting victims of migrant crime.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court blocks candidate after alleged GOP infiltration scheme exposed
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court rejected a progressive candidate's bid to enter Ohio's Republican primary after he allegedly misrepresented his party affiliation.

dailyNews.title: MAN VS MACHINE: Philadelphians aren't taking kindly to sharing sidewalks with delivery robots
dailyNews.description: Philadelphia residents are clashing with Uber Eats delivery robots, with incidents of kicking and sitting on the autonomous sidewalk couriers reported.

dailyNews.title: Child among 4 dead as accused arsonist allegedly drank beer during chaos
dailyNews.description: Roman Amatitla was charged with murder and arson after allegedly setting a random Queens building fire that killed four, including a 3-year-old girl.

dailyNews.description: An anonymous Iranian woman detailed to The Australian the nightly explosions, celebrations and fear in Tehran as Trump's two-week ceasefire with Iran tentatively took hold.

dailyNews.title: Bruce Springsteen blasts rich men in America as critics call out his billions
dailyNews.description: Bruce Springsteen sparked controversy with a fiery anti-Trump speech, but critics point out his reported $1.2 billion net worth undercuts his message.

dailyNews.title: Ivanka Trump breaks down in emotional interview talking about her mother Ivana’s death, other challenges
dailyNews.description: Ivanka Trump became emotional discussing her late mother Ivana Trump's sudden death and other personal challenges during a rare podcast interview.

dailyNews.title: Senate Dem accuses Trump of being 'unfit for office,' joins growing call to impeach, oust president
dailyNews.description: Sen. Andy Kim, D-N.J., said President Donald Trump should be removed over the Iran war, citing the 25th Amendment and impeachment as Democrats escalate calls to oust the president.

dailyNews.title: Amid Trump’s Threats, NATO Labors to Survive the Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump is citing the unwillingness of European nations to back the United States in the conflict as another reason to scale back or abandon the alliance. And he still wants Greenland.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Purged Immigration Judges to Speed Up Deportations
dailyNews.description: Judges are ordering an unprecedented number of people deported after coming under significant pressure from the administration to do so or risk losing their jobs.

dailyNews.title: Xi Seeks to Sway Taiwan, and Trump, With Message of Stability
dailyNews.description: Ahead of a summit with Donald Trump, the Chinese leader is using a rare meeting with a Taiwanese politician to cast Beijing as a peacemaker and squeeze the island’s president.

dailyNews.title: Venezuela Approves New Law to Open Mining to Foreign Investors
dailyNews.description: The move opens the country’s coveted mineral fortune up to foreign investors, the latest move that Venezuela’s leadership has taken to satisfy the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: On Social Media, Democratic Politicians Are Letting the F-Word Fly
dailyNews.description: Democratic politicians are swearing with glee. It is usually aimed at President Trump.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran against charging tolls through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Only about a dozen ships passed through the Strait of Hormuz in the first two days of the ceasefire, far below normal traffic levels before the war, data shows.

dailyNews.title: 4/9: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he asked Netanyahu to scale back Lebanon strikes; Melania Trump makes a rare statement denying relationship with Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: Trump criticizes NATO after talks with Rutte
dailyNews.description: President Trump bashed NATO after meeting with Secretary General Mark Rutte on Wednesday. Ken Thomas, national politics reporter for the Wall Street Journal and Dave Levinthal, senior editor for NOTUS, joined "The Takeout" to discuss that and some of the day's other top political headlines.
